title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!
